raise-error.doc:name: FAIL: Both Pagination Cursors are Present
raise-error.description: Cannot have both before and after pagination cursors

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
import decodeCursor from dataweave::util::Pagination --- decodeCursor(attributes.queryParams.before as String)

%dw 2.0 output application/json
import decodeCursor from dataweave::util::Pagination --- decodeCursor(attributes.queryParams.after as String)

%dw 2.0 output application/json
var content = payload var filters = content.filters default attributes.queryParams.filters default null var sort = content.sort default attributes.queryParams.sort default null --- { direction: content.direction default null, limit: content.limit default attributes.queryParams.limit default 25, q: content.q default attributes.queryParams.q default null, filters: if (filters != null) read(filters, "application/json") else null, sort: if (sort != null) read(sort, "application/json") else null, targetId: content.targetId default null, targetDate: content.targetDate default null }
